attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
TVOUTPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
,TVOUTPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD       
,TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT        
,COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT -  INTERVAL '1'  DAY) OVER 
(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,TVOUTPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT  ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1  FOLLOWING  AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT        
,TVOUTPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM  
,TVOUTPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM    
,TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR         
,TVOUTPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID       
,TVOUTPUT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD          
,TVOUTPUT.DISCOUNT_FLG                  
,TVOUTPUT.STATUS_FLG                    
,TVOUTPUT.SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR              
,TVOUTPUT.ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD  
,TVOUTPUT.DATA_ROUTE_DESCR              
,TVOUTPUT.CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
,TVOUTPUT.UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
,TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DTM
,TVOUTPUT.UPDATE_DTM
,TVOUTPUT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT
,TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,TVOUTPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC)
 AS RANK_INDEX,
(
  CASE
   WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1
 AND NIRCAT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  IS NOT NULL THEN 'U'
   ELSE 'I' END) 
 AS DML_TYPE  
,TVOUTPUT.TRANSITION_FLAG
,TVOUTPUT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG
,TVOUTPUT.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
,TVOUTPUT.DUAL_GAAP_FLAG 

FROM 
(
 SELECT
 TVINPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD            
 ,TVINPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD       
 ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT                 
 ,TVINPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM  
 ,TVINPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM    
 ,TVINPUT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR         
 ,TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID       
 ,TVINPUT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD          
 ,TVINPUT.DISCOUNT_FLG                  
 ,TVINPUT.STATUS_FLG                    
 ,TVINPUT.SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR              
 ,TVINPUT.ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD  
 ,TVINPUT.DATA_ROUTE_DESCR              
 ,TVINPUT.CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
 ,TVINPUT.UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
 ,TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM                    
 ,TVINPUT.UPDATE_DTM        
  ,TVINPUT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT
 ,TVINPUT.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE    
 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY 
  TVINPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
  TVINPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
  TVINPUT.START_TV_DT,
  TVINPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM  
  ,TVINPUT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM    
  ,TVINPUT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR         
  ,TVINPUT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID       
  ,TVINPUT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD          
  ,TVINPUT.DISCOUNT_FLG                  
  ,TVINPUT.STATUS_FLG                    
  ,TVINPUT.SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR              
  ,TVINPUT.ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD  
  ,TVINPUT.DATA_ROUTE_DESCR              
  ,TVINPUT.CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY
  ,TVINPUT.UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
  ,TVINPUT.CREATE_DTM                    
  ,TVINPUT.UPDATE_DTM                   
  ORDER BY CREATE_TIMESTAMP DESC )
   AS ROW_NUM
  ,TVINPUT.ACTION_CODE
  ,TVINPUT.TRANSITION_FLAG
  ,TVINPUT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG
  ,TVINPUT.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG
  ,TVINPUT.DUAL_GAAP_FLAG
 FROM (
     SELECT
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME     BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     CASE WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1  THEN 'REVENUE'
      WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (2,3,4,5,6,22) THEN 'COGS'  END BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
     CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE           START_TV_DT,
     ASMP.START_EFFECTIVE_DATE    ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM ,
     ASMP.END_EFFECTIVE_DATE               ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_DESCRIPTION          ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME     BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,
     ADS.SOURCE_SYSTEM_NAME     ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD,
     COALESCE(ASMP.DISCOUNT_FLAG,'=')      DISCOUNT_FLG,
     ASMP.STATUS_FLAG     STATUS_FLG,
     ASMP.SOX_TIE_IN      SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR,
     COALESCE(ASMP.FREQ_DATA_POSTED,'Daily')      ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD,
     ASMP.DATA_ROUTE     DATA_ROUTE_DESCR,
     NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY     CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY             UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     CAST(COALESCE(ASMP.CREATE_DATETIME,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CREATE_DTM,
     ASMP.UPDATE_DATETIME AS            UPDATE_DTM,
     ASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP                           CREATE_TIMESTAMP,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_ID  SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
     ASMP.ACTION_CODE,
     'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
     (CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE- INTERVAL '1'  DAY)  FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE	,
	COALESCE(ASMP.TRANSITION_FLAG,'N')  TRANSITION_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG,'N')  RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG,'Y')  CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.DUAL_GAAP_FLAG,'N')  DUAL_GAAP_FLAG
     FROM 
      $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_DATA_SOURCES ADS
     ON( ASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID= ADS.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID)
     INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
     ON (NCWP1.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS = ASMP.CREATE_USER)
     INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
     ON (NCWP2.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS = ASMP.UPDATE_USER )
     INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
     ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
     INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
     ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  ) 
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME     BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     CASE WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1  THEN 'REVENUE' WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (2,3,4,5,6,22) THEN 'COGS'  END BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
     CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE           START_TV_DT,
     ASMP.START_EFFECTIVE_DATE    ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM ,
     ASMP.END_EFFECTIVE_DATE               ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_DESCRIPTION          ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME     BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,
     ADS.SOURCE_SYSTEM_NAME     ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD,
     COALESCE(ASMP.DISCOUNT_FLAG,'=')      DISCOUNT_FLG,
     ASMP.STATUS_FLAG     STATUS_FLG,
     ASMP.SOX_TIE_IN      SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR,
     COALESCE(ASMP.FREQ_DATA_POSTED,'Daily')      ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD,
     ASMP.DATA_ROUTE     DATA_ROUTE_DESCR,
     NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY     CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY             UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     CAST(COALESCE(ASMP.CREATE_DATETIME,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))  CREATE_DTM,
     ASMP.UPDATE_DATETIME AS            UPDATE_DTM,
     ASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP                           CREATE_TIMESTAMP,
     ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_ID  SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT,
     ASMP.ACTION_CODE,
     'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
     (CMONTH.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE- INTERVAL '1'  DAY)  FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
	COALESCE(ASMP.TRANSITION_FLAG,'N')  TRANSITION_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG,'N')  RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG,'Y')  CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG,
	COALESCE(ASMP.DUAL_GAAP_FLAG,'N')  DUAL_GAAP_FLAG
     FROM 
      $$EXCEPDB.EX_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP
     INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_DATA_SOURCES ADS
     ON( ASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID= ADS.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID)
     INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
     ON (NCWP1.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS = ASMP.CREATE_USER)
     INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
     ON (NCWP2.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS = ASMP.UPDATE_USER )
     INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_AE_OPEN_PERIOD SAOP
     ON ( SAOP.OPEN_FLAG='Y'  )
     INNER JOIN   $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH  CMONTH
     ON (SAOP.FISCAL_MONTH_ID    =   CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100+ CMONTH.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  )  
     UNION ALL
     SELECT
     NIRCAT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
     NIRCAT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,
     NIRCAT.START_TV_DT,
     NIRCAT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_START_DTM ,
     NIRCAT.ADJ_TYPE_EFFECTIVE_END_DTM,
     NIRCAT.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_DESCR,
     NIRCAT.BK_IROCA_HIERARCHY_NODE_ID,
     NIRCAT.ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CD,
     NIRCAT.DISCOUNT_FLG,
     NIRCAT.STATUS_FLG,
     NIRCAT.SOX_TIE_IN_DESCR,
     NIRCAT.ADJ_DATA_UPDATE_FREQUENCY_CD,
     NIRCAT.DATA_ROUTE_DESCR,
     NIRCAT.CRTD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     NIRCAT.UPD_BY_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,
     NIRCAT.CREATE_DTM,
     NIRCAT.UPDATE_DTM,
     NIRCAT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM  CREATE_TIMESTAMP,
     NIRCAT.SK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_ID_INT ,
     'X' ACTION_CODE, 
     'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
     CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)   FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,
	 NIRCAT.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG,
	 NIRCAT.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLG,
	 NIRCAT.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG,
	 NIRCAT.DUAL_GAAP_FLG
     FROM 
      $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_TYPE_TV NIRCAT
     WHERE  END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
     AND (NIRCAT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,NIRCAT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD) IN
        (SELECT ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,CASE WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1  THEN 'REVENUE' WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (2,3,4,5,6,22) THEN 'COGS'  END BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE
         FROM 
         $$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP 
        UNION
        SELECT ASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,CASE WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID=1  THEN 'REVENUE' WHEN ASMP.MEASURE_ID IN (2,3,4,5,6,22) THEN 'COGS'  END BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE
        FROM 
         $$EXCEPDB.EX_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB ASMP 
        WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI')
    ) TVINPUT
     QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,TVINPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT 
      ORDER BY TVINPUT.CREATE_TIMESTAMP DESC) =1
  
)  TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INDRCT_REV_COGS_ADJ_TYPE_TV  NIRCAT
ON
(TVOUTPUT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD=NIRCAT.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD  AND 
TVOUTPUT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD=NIRCAT.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD AND 
NIRCAT.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) )

SELECT SASMP.BATCH_ID,
SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_KEY, 
SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_ID,
SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME, 
SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_DESCRIPTION,
SASMP.MEASURE_ID, 
SASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID, 
SASMP.OLD_SOURCE_SYSTEM_NAME, 
SASMP.START_EFFECTIVE_DATE, 
SASMP.END_EFFECTIVE_DATE, 
SASMP.START_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID, 
SASMP.END_FISCAL_PERIOD_ID, 
SASMP.DOLLAR_UPLOAD_FLAG, 
SASMP.PERCENTAGE_UPLOAD_FLAG, 
SASMP.DISCOUNT_FLAG,
SASMP.APPROVE_FLAG, 
SASMP.DEPT_ACCT_FLAG, 
SASMP.STATUS_FLAG, 
SASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ADJ_TYPE_ID, 
SASMP.SOX_TIE_IN,
COALESCE(SASMP.FREQ_DATA_POSTED,'Daily') FREQ_DATA_POSTED, 
SASMP.DATA_ROUTE,
SASMP.GMC_ROLLUP, 
SASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_1,
SASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_2, 
CASE WHEN SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME IN ('WARRANTY OPTICAL PROVISION','WARRANTY NON-OPTICAL PROVISION')
THEN SASMP.SUB_MEASURE_NAME ELSE SASMP.REPORT_LEVEL_3 END AS REPORT_LEVEL_3,
SASMP.CREATE_USER, 
SASMP.UPDATE_USER,
SASMP.UPDATE_DATETIME, 
CAST(COALESCE(SASMP.CREATE_DATETIME,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) CREATE_DATETIME,
SASMP.CREATE_TIMESTAMP, 
COALESCE(SASMP.ACTION_CODE,'I') ACTION_CODE,
'RI'EXCEPTION_TYPE,
COALESCE(SASMP.TRANSITION_FLAG,'N') AS TRANSITION_FLAG ,
COALESCE(SASMP.RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG,'N') AS RETAINED_EARNINGS_FLAG ,
COALESCE(SASMP.CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG,'Y') AS CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLAG ,
COALESCE(SASMP.DUAL_GAAP_FLAG,'N') AS  DUAL_GAAP_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_AE_SUB_MEASURE_PUB SASMP
 WHERE (NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM 
	$$ETLVWDB.EL_AE_DATA_SOURCES ADS
	WHERE  SASMP.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID  = ADS.SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID)
	OR NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
	WHERE SASMP.CREATE_USER = NCWP1.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
	OR NOT EXISTS
	( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
	WHERE SASMP.UPDATE_USER = NCWP2.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS) )
